code:
%%{Education_GradeSync}}}%%
sequenceDiagram
    participant User as User
    participant RegistrationForm as Registration Form
    participant FortifyController as Fortify Controller
    participant UserRepository as User Repository
    participant EmailVerification as Email Verification
    participant Database as Database

    User->>RegistrationForm: Fill registration form
    RegistrationForm->>FortifyController: Submit registration data
    FortifyController->>FortifyController: Validate input
    FortifyController->>UserRepository: Create user
    UserRepository->>UserRepository: Generate snowflake ID
    UserRepository->>UserRepository: Generate slug
    UserRepository->>UserRepository: Hash password
    UserRepository->>Database: Save user
    Database-->>UserRepository: Confirm save
    UserRepository-->>FortifyController: Return user
    FortifyController->>EmailVerification: Send verification email
    EmailVerification-->>User: Email with verification link
    FortifyController-->>RegistrationForm: Registration successful
    RegistrationForm-->>User: Show success message

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为GradeSync系统画一个用户注册的时序图。流程是：用户在RegistrationForm填写表单，提交到FortifyController做验证，然后UserRepository负责创建用户，最后还要发邮件验证。
明白。UserRepository创建用户的时候，需要跟Database交互吗？还有，UserRepository内部有哪些具体操作，比如生成ID或者密码处理？
对的，UserRepository要先生成snowflake ID和slug，然后hash密码，最后保存到Database。Database返回确认后，UserRepository再把user返回给FortifyController。
好的，我把这些加上。FortifyController验证完输入后，调用UserRepository创建用户，UserRepository内部完成ID生成、slug生成、密码hash，然后保存到Database。
没错。之后FortifyController要触发EmailVerification给用户发送验证邮件，用户收到带验证链接的邮件。最后FortifyController返回成功信息给RegistrationForm，再展示给用户。
已添加：FortifyController调用EmailVerification发送邮件，EmailVerification把邮件发给User，然后FortifyController返回成功给RegistrationForm，最后RegistrationForm展示success message给用户。
检查一下，Database返回确认给UserRepository，还有UserRepository返回user给FortifyController，这两个是虚线返回吧？
确认，Database--UserRepository是虚线返回confirm save，UserRepository--FortifyController也是虚线返回user。所有异步返回都用虚线，同步调用用实线。
